title: All Too Well
why_this_song: All Too Well by Taylor Swift (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I remember it all too well
You used to be a little kid with glasses in a twin-sized bed
I remember it all too well
And you call me up again just to break me like a promise
So casually cruel in the name of being honest
I'm a crumpled up piece of paper lying here

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remember" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remember" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I remember it all too well, yeah
I'd like to be my old self again

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "All Too Well", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "All Too Well", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "All Too Well" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "All Too Well" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "All Too Well" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "All Too Well", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
